'''Sheva''' was a planet in the [[Sheva system/Legends|Sheva system]] in [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. It was a backwater in the [[Freeworlds Territory]]. It had a liberal government that did little to threaten smugglers and other criminals.

Sheva had one barren moon, the base of the [[Alabard's Comets]]' listening post. Shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], the base was discovered by [[Jinjur Tomas]] in the ''[[Shindra Lady]]''. In exchange for Tomas's silence, the Comets paid Tomas off.
